title: Is eBay Stock a Buy Right Now?
text: The e-commerce stock is exercising an opportunity to boost revenue and profits.

title: Where Is EBay Stock Headed?
text: eBay's stock (NASDAQ﻿NDAQ﻿: EBAY) has lost roughly 31% YTD as compared to the 17% drop in the S&P500 index over the same period. However, at its current price of $46, the stock is trading 25% below its fair value of $61 – Trefis' estimate for eBay's valuation.

title: What do TikTok, Bunnings, eBay and Netflix have in common? They're all hyper-collectors
text: You walk into a shopping centre to buy some groceries. Without your knowledge, an electronic scan of your face is taken by in-store surveillance cameras and stored in an online database.

title: eBay Launches Authentication for Fine Jewelry
text: In collaboration GIA, the Gemological Institute of America, eBay's 'Authenticity Guarantee' service expands to include fine jewelry from brands like Bvlgari, Van Cleef & Arpels and Cartier SAN JOSE, Calif. , July 20, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- As the marketplace's luxury categories continue to gain momentum with double digit growth, eBay announces the expansion of its Authenticity Guarantee to fine jewelry.

title: eBay stock price target cut at Stifel, citing currency pressures
text: Stifel has cut eBay Inc.'s EBAY, -1.08% price target to $60 from $62 amid currency pressures and headwinds in the online marketplace's international business. "We are leaving our 2Q estimates relatively unchanged, however, due to devaluations of international currencies our estimates decline slightly," wrote Stifel analyst Scott Devitt, in a note.

title: 1 Green Flag for eBay, and 1 Red Flag
text: The e-commerce and auction site has seen its stock price cut nearly in half from its all-time high.

title: eBay Could Be a Market-Beating Moneymaker, But It Needs to Stay Focused

title: 7 Nasdaq Stocks to Sell Now
text: If July's market gains begin to wither away, investors would be wise to consider unloading these seven Nasdaq stocks to sell. The post 7 Nasdaq Stocks to Sell Now appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: eBay: Massive Undervaluation Despite E-Commerce Slowdown
text: We expect the retail industry sales to continue normalizing throughout 2022 as we see challenges from declining consumer confidence as well as normalizing wage and employment growth. In e-commerce, we believe the long-term trend of rising e-commerce sales penetration could resume with the normalizing growth of physical retail as traffic improves.

title: Exploit the War on Cash By Buying Shares of This Fintech Giant Today
text: Don't let the recent sell-off fool you -- fintech companies are the future of the financial services industry.

title: MercadoLibre's Strong Revenue Streams Will Outperform eBay's In The Long Run
text: The great business model of MercadoLibre is aimed at long-term growth, and scalability will shine over the next decade. MercadoLibre has no competitor in such a challenging landscape in Latin America, while eBay's growth limits are near as the company faces growing competition worldwide.
